Today was my last day in the university. They asked me to take a selfie for a linked in post and I liked it so I decided to share it here to remind people I'm a real person. 

#selfie #gayselfie #work #linkedIn #research #ecology #tech #greenTech #Dev #development #softwareDevelopment #Greece #Athens
